arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Raheem Sterling makes vow as Gunners eye Premier League star
arts.sum: Arsenal are set to take on Real Madrid in the quarter-finals of the Champions League next month and Gunners boss Mikel Arteta hopes that his side can go all the way

arts.ttl: Leicester 'deserved points' from Chelsea game - Van Nistelrooy
arts.sum: Leicester City manager Ruud van Nistelrooy says his side "deserved points" following their performance against Chelsea which resulted in a 1-0 defeat at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Copenhagen: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Chelsea host Copenhagen in Europe on Thursday. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea get boost for Bundesliga striker as price slashed
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are looking to move on from Victor Boniface this summer, according to reports in Germany. The Nigerian striker, who was once a key figure under Xabi Alonso, has endured a difficult season, losing his place in the starting lineup due to injury and off-field controversies. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gets what he wants from Raheem Sterling - but Arsenal star can't catch a break
arts.sum: ARSENAL 2-2 PSV (9-3 ON AGGREGATE): Mikel Arteta's much-changed squad brushed off their title race disappointment to cruise through to the Champions League quarter-finals

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea learn cheap price-tag of Bournemouth star
arts.sum: Chelsea are weighing up a summer raid on Bournemouth as they look to strengthen their squad, with Antoine Semenyo, Dean Huijsen, and Milos Kerkez all on their radar. However, securing all three players won’t be easy, with strong competition expected for each of them. arts.ttl: Liverpool and Everton's 'Siamese-style' ground, Chelsea's bid to reignite Battersea and Barcelona's Mediterranean marvel... crazy stadium plans that were NEVER built, as Man United unveil £2bn 'umbrella' arena
arts.sum: The world's eyes have been drawn to Manchester United's new £2billion stadium plan since the club's announcement this week.

arts.ttl: What next for the six Man United stars Sir Jim Ratcliffe blasted as 'not good enough' and 'overpaid'? Casemiro looks the most likely to leave, Antony is loving life at Real Betis... but Jadon Sancho could have a shock route back
arts.sum: On Monday, the Manchester United part-owner dropped a verbal bullet which will have sent shivers down the spines of five players in particular.

arts.ttl: Levi Colwill gives honest Thomas Tuchel verdict as England told to learn from Chelsea success
arts.sum: While not playing a first-team game, he was a member of the pre-season tour squad ahead of the 2022-23 campaign and spent time working with the new England manager, who led Chelsea to Champions League glory in 2021. Chelsea defender Levi Colwill has described Thomas Tuchel as a "top manager" as the former Blues boss prepares to name his first England squad.

arts.ttl: Report: How much Chelsea could now have to pay to sign 'massive' target Antoine Semenyo
arts.sum: It's really not that much in this day and age.
